flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Florida SouthWestern State College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Florida SouthWestern State College rose 15% between 2006 and 2009 (56.0% → 64.7%).
